title: Rewrite Collector fully — all three helpers to idiomatic Enum
prompt: Refactor MyApp.Collector from test_fixtures/list_append_loop.ex. All three functions (`chars_to_upper/1`, `numbered/1`, `positive_only/1`) should be rewritten using `Enum` functions — no explicit recursion, no `acc ++ [x]`. Use `Enum.map`, `Enum.with_index`, and `Enum.filter` respectively. Output a complete `defmodule MyApp.Collector do ... end`.
tier_rationale: Three-function rewrite requires three distinct Enum functions.
